design_plan: rng=42; AIDA pass; hero 2–3 lines max‑width≈1120px; bento density uses grid-auto-flow:dense; labels sweep covers Folk, Orchids, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok; primary black CTA contrast AA+; cache value framed editorially without pricing.
headline: Super vs Folk — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Folk. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Folk

summary: A fair comparison for people evaluating Super against Folk. Folk fits niche automation and lightweight workflows. Super is built for durable computer‑use agents that actually operate browsers and desktops — and reuse a computer-use cache so repeated work gets faster and cheaper over time.
